The '''Anti-orbital cannon''' was a weapon emplacement constructed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] that was used against orbiting [[Starship/Legends|starships]], particularly [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. They saw use on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] at the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
The Anti-orbital cannon was specifically designed in mind to target capital ships, as evidenced by their large size. They were constructed on a fixed platform and received its source of power from a network of four to six [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]]. The generators, including the cannon itself, were not [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]]. In the event the generators are destroyed, the cannon will explode.<ref name="Prima's Official Strategy Guide">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

==History==
At least three Anti-orbital cannons formed part of the line of defense prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]. Before [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|republic forces]] could touch down into the [[Petranaki arena|geonosian arena]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] strike team consisting of [[Jedi Master/Legends|masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Undili]] embarked on the surface, making use of [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|fighter tanks]] to search for and destroy these emplacements.<ref name="Prima's Official Strategy Guide" /><ref name="Clone Wars 2002 video game">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]</ref>

Upon the destruction of the cannons, the duo proceeded to secure a landing pad allowing [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier/Legends|clone forces]] to deploy a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transports]] carrying additional Jedi to the arena. After fighting their way through numerous patrols consisting of [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]], [[Ground Armored Tank|tanks]], [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|hailfire droids]], and [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|spider droids]], they eventually came across and eliminated a confederacy outpost situated behind the arena. The convoy then debarked a compliment of Jedi, in which they proceeded to infiltrate the perimeter in preparation for the imminent rescue of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].<ref name="Prima's Official Strategy Guide" /><ref name="Clone Wars 2002 video game" />
